message:
refactor: complete telemetry → history module rename

This commit completes the rename of the telemetry module to history,
removing all compatibility shims and updating all references throughout
the codebase.

Changes:
- src/telemetry/ → src/history/ (git mv preserving history)
- Remove #[path = "telemetry/mod.rs"] shim from lib.rs
- Rename tests/telemetry_integration.rs → tests/history_integration.rs
- Rename tests/telemetry_full_flow.rs → tests/history_full_flow.rs
- Rename tests/e2e/run_telemetry_e2e.sh → tests/e2e/run_history_e2e.sh
- Rename .github/workflows/telemetry-e2e.yml → history-e2e.yml
- Update all internal references (doc comments, workflow paths, etc.)

The module is now cleanly named "history" everywhere with no legacy
telemetry references remaining in code, tests, or CI configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+name: history-e2e
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    paths:
+      - "src/history/**"
+      - "tests/common/**"
+      - "tests/history_*.rs"
+      - "tests/e2e/run_history_e2e.sh"
+      - ".github/workflows/history-e2e.yml"
+  push:
+    branches: [master, main]
+    paths:
+      - "src/history/**"
+      - "tests/common/**"
+      - "tests/history_*.rs"
+      - "tests/e2e/run_history_e2e.sh"
+      - ".github/workflows/history-e2e.yml"
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+  RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
+
+jobs:
+  e2e:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - name: Build release
+        run: cargo build --release
+
+      - name: Run history E2E
+        run: |
+          chmod +x tests/e2e/run_history_e2e.sh
+          tests/e2e/run_history_e2e.sh 2>&1 | tee history-e2e.log
+
+      - name: Upload logs
+        if: failure()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: history-e2e-logs
+          path: history-e2e.log
